queries: E2E pipeline Creating and Scheduling Data Pipelines 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Creating and Scheduling Data Pipelines 2023

annotations.title: End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook
Building pipelines • Scheduling • Create a schedule • Palantir
DaphneSched: A Scheduler for Integrated Data Analysis Pipelines
Best Practices in Data Pipeline Test Automation - Dataversity
Towards Next Generation Data Engineering Pipelines

content.text:
Creating and scheduling end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines are essential for automating data workflows, ensuring timely data processing, and maintaining high-quality data outputs. Below are several authoritative and recent sources that provide comprehensive guidance on this topic:

1. **E2E Cloud Documentation on Scheduled Runs**: This resource offers a step-by-step guide on setting up scheduled runs for data pipelines, detailing how to automate pipeline execution at specific times or intervals. ([docs.e2enetworks.com](https://docs.e2enetworks.com/docs/tir/Pipeline/ScheduledRun/?utm_source=openai))

2. **GitLab Handbook on End-to-End Pipeline Monitoring**: GitLab's handbook provides insights into monitoring E2E test pipelines, including scheduling and managing pipeline runs to ensure consistent and reliable data processing. ([handbook.gitlab.com](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/testing/end-to-end-pipeline-monitoring/?utm_source=openai))

3. **UiPath AI Center User Guide on Managing Pipelines**: This guide explains how to create and schedule pipelines within UiPath's AI Center, covering aspects such as defining pipeline types, selecting datasets, and setting up schedules using cron expressions. ([docs.uipath.com](https://docs.uipath.com/ai-center/automation-suite/2023.4/user-guide/managing-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

4. **Palantir's Guide on Creating Schedules for Data Lineage**: Palantir's documentation outlines the process of creating schedules for data lineage, including navigating the schedule editor and defining schedules to automate data pipeline builds. ([palantir.com](https://www.palantir.com/docs/foundry/building-pipelines/create-schedule/?utm_source=openai))

5. **DaphneSched: A Scheduler for Integrated Data Analysis Pipelines**: This academic paper introduces DaphneSched, a versatile scheduler designed to efficiently execute integrated data analysis pipelines, showcasing its effectiveness through performance evaluations on multicore platforms. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.01607?utm_source=openai))

6. **Best Practices in Data Pipeline Test Automation**: This article discusses the importance of automated testing in data pipeline development, emphasizing the need for structured and efficient testing practices to ensure high-quality data outputs. ([dataversity.net](https://www.dataversity.net/articles/best-practices-in-data-pipeline-test-automation/?utm_source=openai))

7. **Towards Next Generation Data Engineering Pipelines**: This research paper explores the evolution of data engineering pipelines, proposing approaches for optimized, self-aware, and self-adapting pipelines to enhance data quality and responsiveness to changes. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.13892?utm_source=openai))

These resources provide a solid foundation for understanding the creation and scheduling of E2E data pipelines, offering both practical guides and theoretical insights to enhance your data engineering practices.
